scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true})" && tsc -b tsconfig.json && vite build --config vite.config.ts && node -e "require('node:fs').cpSync('midia','dist/renderer/midia',{recursive:true})" && node copy-workspace-packages.cjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native:electron && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('release/win-unpacked',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.rmSync('release/builder-debug.yml',{force:true});" && electron-builder --win --publish never && npm rebuild better-sqlite3
